{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}{{ meta.title if meta is defined and meta.title else title or site.title }}{% endblock %} {% block description %}{{ meta.description if meta is defined and meta.description else description or site.description }}{% endblock %} {% block content %} {% if alert %} {% if alert.icon %} {% endif %} {% if alert.strong %}{{ alert.strong }}{% endif %} {{ alert.text }} {% endif %} {% if hero %}

{% elif hero.eyebrow %}

{{ hero.eyebrow }}

{% endif %}

{{ hero.title or title }}

{% if hero.body %}

{{ hero.body }}

{% elif hero.subtitle %}

{{ hero.subtitle }}

{% endif %} {% if hero.actions %}

{% for action in hero.actions %} {{ action.label }} {% endfor %}

{% endif %}
{% if hero.image %} {% with img=image(hero.image, 'hero'), fallback_class='shrine', loading='eager' %} {% include "_content_image.html" %} {% endwith %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% if breadcrumb %} {% if breadcrumb.separator %} {{ breadcrumb.separator }} {% endif %} {% for item in breadcrumb.entries %} {{ item.label }} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% if article %}
{{ article | safe }}
{% endif %}

{{ posts_section.heading or 'Latest transmissions' }}

{% set collection_name = posts_section.collection or 'posts' %} {% set entries = collections[collection_name] if collections and collections[collection_name] is defined else [] %} {% for entry in entries %} {% set featured_image = posts_section.featured.image or entry.cover_image %} {% if loop.first and posts_section.featured and featured_image %}
{% with img=image(featured_image, 'featured'), fallback_class='post-wide', loading='lazy' %} {% include "_content_image.html" %} {% endwith %}
{% endif %} {% if entry.tags %}

{% for tag in entry.tags %} {{ tag }} {% endfor %}

{% endif %}

{{ entry.title }}

{% if entry.summary %}

{{ entry.summary }}

{% endif %}

{% if entry.date %} {{ entry.date|date if entry.date.strftime is defined else entry.date }} {% endif %} {% if entry.reading_minutes %} {{ entry.reading_minutes }} min read {% endif %}

{% if loop.first and posts_section.featured %} {{ posts_section.featured.cta_label or 'read' }} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% if posts_section.pagination %}
{% for item in posts_section.pagination.entries %} {{ item.label }} {% endfor %}
{% endif %}
{% if sidebar and sidebar.cards %}
{% for card in sidebar.cards %} {% if card.corner %} {% endif %} {% if card.avatar %} {% endif %}

{{ card.title }}

{% if card.type == 'profile' %}

{{ card.text | fmt }}

{% elif card.type == 'tags' and tag_links %}

{% for tag in tag_links %} {{ tag.label }} {% endfor %}

{% elif card.type == 'altar' %}

{% for icon in card.icons %} {% endfor %}

{% elif card.type == 'image' %} {% with img=image(card.image, 'sidebar'), fallback_class='sidebar-art', loading='lazy' %} {% include "_content_image.html" %} {% endwith %} {% elif card.type == 'mastodon_timeline' and site.mastodon.timeline.enabled %}
{% else %} {% if card.text %}

{{ card.text | fmt }}

{% endif %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% endblock %}
